Week10: 
LLM all functions. More realistic than previous best GP model with UCB Kappa=0.1 for F3,4,7 and EI Xi=0.1 for F8.
LLM yielded previous best result for F2,5,6. No improvement yet in F1. Improved few-shot prompts this week.
